full_prompt: Design a CFRP monocoque primary structure for a collegiate formula-class racecar benchmark 2026 electric-drive (EV) car, complying with FS Rules 2026 chapter T (Technical Regulations) and the Structural Equivalency Spreadsheet (SES) approach. The monocoque substitutes for the prescriptive steel space-frame primary structure; equivalency is demonstrated per FS Rules Appendix T.2. Vehicle total wet mass 240 kg excluding driver; driver 75 kg. Envelope: wheelbase 1600 mm, track 1200 mm, monocoque length 2200 mm, nominal cockpit cross-section 320 mm wide x 500 mm tall. Laminate schedule: CFRP skins 2 mm (outer) + aramid honeycomb core 25 mm + CFRP skins 2 mm (inner). Skin material: T800/epoxy twill fabric (E_eff 60 GPa, tensile 750 MPa, compressive 650 MPa, density 1540 kg/m^3). Core: Nomex aramid honeycomb 48 kg/m^3 (shear 1.45 MPa, density 48 kg/m^3). Mandatory SES equivalency targets vs steel space-frame baseline (prescriptive 1.0 inch x 0.095 wall 4130 chromoly): (a) side-impact equivalency: panel must absorb >= 7350 J at <= 40 g average on 300 kg mass; (b) front-bulkhead equivalency: front impact structure attached in front must transmit no more than 40 g peak to driver; (c) main-hoop + front-hoop equivalency: passing nominal rollover load of 6 kN axial on each hoop without yield; (d) harness bar tensile 13.24 kN per FS T.3.6.2. Load cases: (LC1) front impact 20 g on 315 kg (vehicle + driver) into 300 mm impact attenuator reacting at front bulkhead - monocoque front face must not rupture; (LC2) side impact 7 g on 315 kg at side-impact panel region; (LC3) rollover 6 kN axial on main-hoop peak mount while wheels pinned; (LC4) harness bar pull 13.24 kN applied at the harness attachment bolts into monocoque; (LC5) stiffness: torsional stiffness from +/-1000 N couple across front axle vs rear axle must exceed 2000 N*m/deg; (LC6) structural equivalency panel test (LC-SES): simulate the 3-point bending test defined in FS Rules Appendix T.2 (e.g. 3-point bend with span and load per the spreadsheet) and confirm energy/stiffness per spec. Pass/fail (per collegiate formula-class racecar 2026 + FS Rules Ch T): (R1) max CFRP skin Tsai-Wu failure index at LC1-LC4 ultimate must remain below 1.0 at factor-of-safety 1.5 applied; (R2) core shear under LC1 and LC2 must remain below 0.725 MPa (1.45 / 2.0 core FoS); (R3) torsional stiffness under LC5 must exceed 2000 N*m/deg; (R4) monocoque dry mass (all skins + core + inserts, excluding rollbars and other metallic hardware) must not exceed 45 kg; (R5) first torsional mode must exceed 25 Hz; (R6) harness bar pull-out under LC4 must not produce insert pull-through above 10 kN limit per FS Rules T.3.6.2; (R7) SES panel test equivalency (LC6) must meet the prescriptive baseline (bending stiffness E*I and energy absorption) recorded in the collegiate formula-class racecar SES spreadsheet. Thermal, fluid, radiation, buckling not primary. Deliverables: STEP AP242 of monocoque shell (sandwich layers as one solid), layup schedule, FEA per load case, SES equivalency tables, modal report.
short_prompt:
Design the CFRP monocoque primary structure of a collegiate formula-class racecar benchmark 2026 EV per FS Rules 2026 Ch T + SES equivalency (Appendix T.2). Vehicle wet 240 kg + 75 kg driver; wheelbase 1600 mm, track 1200 mm, cockpit 320 x 500 mm, monocoque length 2200 mm. Laminate: 2 mm T800/epoxy twill + 25 mm Nomex honeycomb (48 kg/m^3) + 2 mm inner skin.

SES targets: (a) side-impact energy absorption >= 7350 J on 300 kg at <= 40 g avg; (b) front-bulkhead FIS transmits <= 40 g peak; (c) main/front hoop equivalency at 6 kN axial without yield; (d) harness-bar tensile 13.24 kN per T.3.6.2.

Factor regime: Tsai-Wu <= 1.0 at FoS 1.5 on LC1-LC4 ultimate; core-shear FoS 2.0 (allowable 0.725 MPa) on front/side impact; torsional stiffness > 2000 N-m/deg; monocoque dry mass <= 45 kg; first torsional mode > 25 Hz; harness-insert pull-through limit 10 kN.

Load cases.
- Front impact 20 g on 315 kg into a 300 mm IA, reacted at the front bulkhead.
- Side impact 7 g on 315 kg at the side-impact panel.
- Rollover 6 kN axial on the main-hoop peak mount, wheels pinned.
- Harness bar pull: 13.24 kN at the harness attachment bolts.
- Stiffness: +/- 1000 N couple across front vs rear axle.
- SES 3-point bend panel test per FS Appendix T.2.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: Structural Equivalency Spreadsheet is mandated by FS Rules and is not FEA; it tabulates E*I, E*A, and energy equivalence vs prescriptive steel baseline.

prompt.title: collegiate formula-class racecar benchmark 2026 CFRP Monocoque
prompt.brief: CFRP skin + Nomex core sandwich monocoque, FS Rules Ch T + collegiate formula-class racecar SES equivalency to steel space frame.

load_cases.name: SES_3pt_bend
load_cases.application: per collegiate formula-class racecar SES spreadsheet

pass_fail_criteria.limit: >= prescriptive 4130 baseline for E*I and energy

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: layered shell (sandwich modeling) for all monocoque; solids for metallic inserts

exclusions_explained.buckling_analysis: Sandwich face-wrinkling criterion sits inside Tsai-Wu check for this build; not a separate FEA.
